author: b.hartnett
content: Considering that precompiled contracts are not actually stored in the state trie, then why does EIP-7928 require the precompile addresses to be added to the block access list? The motivation for the read locations in the BAL is to support batch IO but there is no disk IO in this case.

author: nero_eth
content: E.g. CALL to a precompile would not be included but BALANCE would?
